# criblio_search_macro (Resource)

SearchMacro Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_search_macro" "my_search_macro" {
  description = "Filters to high-severity events."
  group_id = "default_search"
  id = "error_filter"
  replacement = "severity >= \"Error\""
  tags = "errors,prod"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tools/codegen -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) Worker group ID.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the Macro.
- `replacement` (String) Query fragment that is substituted when the Macro is referenced in a search.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Brief description of the Macro.
- `tags` (String) Tag used to filter Macros.

### Read-Only

- `created` (Integer) Timestamp (in Unix time) when the Macro was created (milliseconds).
- `created_by` (String) Username of the user who created the Macro.
- `modified` (Integer) Timestamp (in Unix time) for when the Macro was last modified (milliseconds).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = criblio_search_macro.my_criblio_search_macro
  id = jsonencode({
    group_id = "default_search"
    id       = "error_filter"
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import criblio_search_macro.my_criblio_search_macro '{"group_id":"default_search","id":"error_filter"}'
```
